table_queries.orders: SELECT order_detail_id, purchase_time, manufacturer_code, manufacturer_name, hospital_code, hospital_name, drug_code, generic_name, drug_category, purchase_quantity, purchase_amount, delivery_enterprise_code, delivery_enterprise_name, order_status, delivery_time, received_time, province_code, province, hospital_level FROM {table} WHERE purchase_time > toDateTime('1971-01-01') AND purchase_time >= toDateTime('{from_date}') AND purchase_time <= toDateTime('{to_date}') {manufacturer_scope_clause} {limit_clause}
table_queries.drug_master: SELECT DISTINCT drug_code, generic_name, drug_category FROM {table} WHERE purchase_time > toDateTime('1971-01-01') AND purchase_time >= toDateTime('{from_date}') AND purchase_time <= toDateTime('{to_date}') AND drug_code != '' {manufacturer_scope_clause} {limit_clause}
table_queries.hospital_master: SELECT DISTINCT hospital_code, hospital_name, province_code, province, hospital_level FROM {table} WHERE purchase_time > toDateTime('1971-01-01') AND purchase_time >= toDateTime('{from_date}') AND purchase_time <= toDateTime('{to_date}') AND hospital_code != '' {manufacturer_scope_clause} {limit_clause}
table_queries.manufacturer_master: SELECT DISTINCT manufacturer_code, manufacturer_name FROM {table} WHERE purchase_time > toDateTime('1971-01-01') AND purchase_time >= toDateTime('{from_date}') AND purchase_time <= toDateTime('{to_date}') AND manufacturer_code != '' {manufacturer_scope_clause} {limit_clause}
table_queries.delivery_events: SELECT order_detail_id, delivery_time, received_time, order_status, delivery_enterprise_code, delivery_enterprise_name FROM {table} WHERE purchase_time > toDateTime('1971-01-01') AND purchase_time >= toDateTime('{from_date}') AND purchase_time <= toDateTime('{to_date}') {manufacturer_scope_clause} {limit_clause}

caveats: development sample selects a small manufacturer set and reads complete orders for those manufacturers across the full time window; row-level top sampling is forbidden
delivery_time and received_time contain many 1970 sentinel values and must not enable delivery-time detector by default
product_line mapping is not available; drug_category is only a display fallback
